hero.label: Revenue Recovery Audit
hero.title: Find and fix what is blocking revenue.
hero.description: A 3-input diagnostic that tells us where to focus before anything else gets built.

form.title: Tell us where revenue is getting stuck.

product.label: What do you sell?
product.placeholder: Enterprise platform, retail ops, hiring service...

stuck.label: Where is revenue getting stuck?
stuck.placeholder: Renewals, onboarding, billing handoff, executive approval...

urgency.label: Urgency
urgency.placeholder: This week, this quarter, future planning

success.title: We’ll review this and reach out directly.
success.message: Hi {{recipient}}, I just submitted the revenue recovery audit. We sell {{product}} and revenue is getting stuck at {{stuck}}. Urgency: {{urgency}}.
